case_title: BERNAL HOUSING ASSOCIATES,LP VS. ABIGAIL ARANA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - PLAINTIFF ADDRESSED TO THE COURT ABOUT THE FILING AND THE SERVICE OF THE OPPOSITION. THE COURT REVIEWED THE OPPOSITION AND OVERRULED DEFENDANT ABIGAIL ARANA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, 5 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNAL HOUSING ASSOCIATES,LP SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-06-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT THEREON. JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED UPON BREACH OF STIPULATION. STIPULATION OUTLINES A PAYMENT PLAN. SEE SCANNED DOC. FOR SPECIFICS. NON COMPLIANCE WITH THETERMS OF THIS STIPULATION AGREEMENT WILL BE EVIDENCED BY A WRITTEN DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, UPON TWENTY-FOUR HOURS NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT WHICH SHALL ENTITLE PLAINTIFF TO JUDGMENT FOR THE PREMISE AND AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR THE FULL BALANCE AS STATED IN THE DECLARATION OF NON-COMPLIANCE. UPON FULL COMPLIANCE BY DEFENDANT, THIS ACTI FILED BY BERNAL HOUSING ASSOCIATES,LP ARANA, ABIGAIL DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Department 218 this date for settlement conference.
Appearances: Linda Reyes, Esq. for plaintiffs, Bernal Housing Associates
Arthur Singer, Esq.for defendant Abigail Arana,is also present
Jose F.Vergara interpretor for Abigail Arana from English to Spanish and Spanish to English
The parties entered into stipulation, which is read into the record. The trial date is vacated. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Abigail Arana, appearing in propria persona (no phone no.), demurring party
Linda Reyes, Esq. 510/786-9323, for plaintiff and opposing party
* Plaintiff addressed to the Court about the filing and the service of the opposition.
** The Court reviewed the opposition and OVERRULED DEFENDANT ABIGAIL ARANA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, 5 days from the notice of entry of order to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780
